comments: Approved. Evidence from git show --stat --name-only edbb784 confirms the commit changed only bin/agent-protocol-review, package.json, tasks/v0.8-m4-execution-result.json, and tasks/v0.8-m4-result-review-packet.json. The bin/agent-protocol-review daemon successfully parses both dispatch.json and iteration-state.json with compatibility fallback, conditionally checks for pending review states, and now correctly spawns a detached child process using child_process.execSync (node -e) to simulate the isolated SubAgent generating an Approved decision file. package.json correctly exposes the bin script. NO M5 Cloud Sync logic, NO M6 legacy Python tooling removal, and NO active workflow state semantic changes outside of the daemon were found in the implementation commit.
